subject: Drop support for postgres-legacy common chart
commit_message:
Drop support for postgres-legacy common chart

There is no need to maintain two postgres charts if all components can
work with the newest version so let's remove the legacy one.

Issue-ID: OOM-2310
Signed-off-by: Krzysztof Opasiak <k.opasiak@samsung.com>
Change-Id: I8b399902e37fdec7e55552e7972daaf1c0c74cfe

Patch Set 1:

Has there been testing to verify that inventory works with the new postgres, along with all the  DCAE service components that use postgres via the pgaas plugin?

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

Yes I did validate using new postgress (couple weeks back; this was before Sylvain change related to encoding). My setup/deploy then included everything other than SCH (since I don't have SDC).

May help to retest it with new updates (and including SDC) as oom gating reporting onap-dcae-servicechange-handler failure. Will check and report the results - keeping -1 until then.

Patch Set 1: Code-Review+1

Following are results from new deploy/test in Windriver/DCAE tenant. The servicechange-handler is stuck on init as SDC did not come up clean. 

Rest of dcae components using pg - Inventory/Dashboard/Bootstrap & holmes were successful.
